MARKET_RADAR.mitigation: enforce provenance scoring and confidence threshold

LEAD_INTELLIGENCE.risk: low quality lead sources inflate pipeline
LEAD_INTELLIGENCE.mitigation: allow-list sources and enforce source registry policies

COMPANY_BRAIN.mitigation: weekly context refresh SLA with owner sign-off

DECISION_PASSPORT.risk: actions executed without complete decision context
DECISION_PASSPORT.mitigation: block external actions unless passport is complete

WHATSAPP_DECISION_LAYER.mitigation: role-based command policy + audit trail + manual confirmation

ACTION_APPROVAL_ENGINE.risk: high-risk actions approved without dual control
ACTION_APPROVAL_ENGINE.mitigation: risk-tiered approval with mandatory dual control for high risk

DELIVERY_OS.risk: scope drift leads to delivery failures
DELIVERY_OS.mitigation: enforce acceptance criteria and change control gate

CUSTOMER_PORTAL.risk: poor portal adoption reduces value realization

SUPPORT_OS.risk: unsafe response drafts sent to customers
SUPPORT_OS.mitigation: draft-only default with approval mode for external send

PAYMENT_TRUTH.risk: billing state mismatch causes trust erosion
PAYMENT_TRUTH.mitigation: reconciliation checks and finance owner approval

PROOF_ENGINE.risk: proof claims without evidence damage credibility
PROOF_ENGINE.mitigation: proof event must include evidence level and source

EXPANSION_ENGINE.risk: upsell attempts before proof creates churn
EXPANSION_ENGINE.mitigation: expansion blocked unless proof threshold is met

LEARNING_FLYWHEEL.mitigation: weekly learning actions tied to backlog owner

TRUST_LAYER.mitigation: scope compliance claims to evidence and controls implemented

SECURITY.mitigation: scope claims to implemented controls, evidence, and approved audits only
object/field/function authorization tests in release gate

OBSERVABILITY.mitigation: trace and audit logging coverage gate in CI
